transcript: Speaker A: Want to improve your English? Learn B2 English with Duolingo. Our new lessons teach you useful phrases for real life, so you can reach your career goals. It's free, fun, and effective. Download Duolingo, the number one language learning app.

summary: The ad promotes Duolingo's intermediate B2 English course, highlighting practical lessons for real-life and career advancement. It showcases the app's interactive interface and gamified learning style. The video ends with a call to download the free app.
